title: Preparing Cholesterol for use in NGM
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7pnt2","text":"C. elegans requires cholesterol to progress through the four larval stages. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":0,"length":11}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"biefg","text":"CHOLESTEROL-PEG 600 Sigma- C1145-250MG (stored at -20 degrees) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"c51u2","text":"\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5u4u7","text":"Ethanol absolute (Stored in flammables cupboard) ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Prepare 5 mg/ml in Ethanol by resuspending the whole 250mg vial in 50 ml ~100% ethanol.
Store at 4 degrees protected from the light
creator: Bonnie Evans
